filter.comment: Used when creating snapshots in vmm:persist::snapshot_memory_to_file through std::fs::File::metadata
Used by live snapshot to write pages at offset (pwrite)
Used by the VirtIO net device to write to tap
Used by the VirtIO net device to read from tap
Used for creating io_uring completion event, on drive patch
Used for submitting io_uring requests
Used on drive patch
Used on drive patch
Called for expanding the heap
Rust std uses it during panic to print the thread id.
Used for metrics and logging, via the helpers in utils/src/time.rs. It's not called on some platforms, because of vdso optimisations.
Needed for vsock
Used for drive patching & rescanning, for reading the local timezone from /etc/localtime
Used for snapshotting
Used by the block device
Used for re-allocating large memory regions, for example vectors
Used for freeing memory
Used by vsock to retrieve data from the socket
rt_sigprocmask is used by libc::abort during a panic to block and unblock signals
rt_sigreturn is needed in case a fault does occur, so that the signal handler can return. Otherwise we get stuck in a fault loop.
sigaltstack is used by Rust stdlib to remove alternative signal stack during thread teardown.
Used by std::thread::spawn to create the ring buffer drain thread during BPF live snapshots.
Used by Rust stdlib to set thread name (PR_SET_NAME) when spawning named threads.
Used by Rust stdlib / glibc when spawning new threads.
Used by Rust stdlib / musl when spawning new threads.
getrandom is used by aws-lc library which we consume in virtio-rng
Called to accept vsock connections
Used by snapshotting, drive patching and rescanning
Used for synchronization (during thread teardown when joining multiple vcpu threads at once)
Used for synchronization (during thread teardown)
Used for synchronization
Used for synchronization
Used for synchronization
Used by bpf_fault live snapshot to pre-allocate the snapshot memory file on tmpfs, avoiding per-page allocation during streaming.

Used by the VirtIO balloon device and by musl for some customer workloads. It is also used by aws-lc during random number generation. They setup a memory page that mark with MADV_WIPEONFORK to be able to detect forks. They also call it with -1 to see if madvise is supported in certain platforms.
Used by the VirtIO pmem device to sync the file content with the backing file.
Used by the VirtIO balloon device
Used for reading the timezone in LocalTime::now()
Used by rust's stdlib, particularly when creating a diff snapshot of a VM with ~16 GB of memory
Used by io_uring for mapping the queues
Used by libbpf to mmap BPF ELF data and kernel BTF files
rt_sigaction is used by libc::abort during a panic to install the default handler for SIGABRT
Called to open the vsock UDS
Rust std uses it to write to unix socket
tkill is used by libc::abort during a panic to raise SIGABRT
Used to kick vcpus
Needed for rate limiting and metrics
Used to make vsock UDS nonblocking
Triggered on shutdown, to restore the initial terminal settings.
Triggered on shutdown, to restore the initial terminal settings, only when Firecracker was launched from a shell.
Triggered on shutdown, to restore the initial terminal settings, only when Firecracker was launched from a shell.

args.comment: KVM_SET_USER_MEMORY_REGION, used to (un)plug memory for the virtio-mem device

filter.comment: Used by the rust standard library in std::sync::mpmc. Firecracker uses mpsc channels from this module for inter-thread communication
Used by vhost-user frontend to communicate with the backend
Used by vhost-user frontend to read response from the backend
automatically issued by the kernel when specific timing-related syscalls (e.g. nanosleep) get interrupted by SIGSTOP
Used by memory hotplug to protect access to underlying host memory
Used by live snapshot to create a userfaultfd for write-protect tracking (fallback when /dev/userfaultfd is absent)
USERFAULTFD_IOC_NEW, used by live snapshot to create userfaultfd via /dev/userfaultfd
UFFDIO_API, used by live snapshot to initialize userfaultfd
UFFDIO_REGISTER, used by live snapshot to register guest memory with userfaultfd
UFFDIO_UNREGISTER, used by live snapshot to unregister guest memory from userfaultfd
UFFDIO_WRITEPROTECT, used by live snapshot to enable/disable write protection
BPF_MAP_CREATE, used by bpf_fault live snapshot to create ring buffer map
BPF_MAP_UPDATE_ELEM, used by bpf_fault live snapshot to set up struct_ops map
BPF_PROG_LOAD, used by bpf_fault live snapshot to load BPF program
BPF_BTF_LOAD, used by bpf_fault live snapshot to load program BTF
BPF_LINK_CREATE, used by bpf_fault live snapshot to attach fault handler
BPF_LINK_FAULT_OPS_CMD, used by bpf_fault live snapshot to enable/resolve write protection
BPF_OBJ_GET_INFO_BY_FD, used by libbpf to query map/prog info after loading
BPF_MAP_LOOKUP_ELEM, used by libbpf for feature probing during BPF object loading
BPF_MAP_DELETE_ELEM, used by libbpf for feature probing during BPF object loading
Used by libbpf to probe /sys/kernel/btf/vmlinux availability during BPF object loading
Used by libbpf to detect kernel version during BPF object loading
Used by libbpf to create memfd for BTF data during BPF object loading
Used by libbpf to open /sys/kernel/btf/vmlinux and other kernel BTF files
Used by libbpf to check RLIMIT_MEMLOCK for BPF map memory
Used by libbpf (via musl) for file stat operations during BPF object loading
Used by libbpf for fd management during BPF object loading
Used by libbpf for log messages during BPF object loading
Used by libbpf for fd management during BPF object loading
